description: Model returns a valid quote but tags the claim with domains that map to the wrong top-domain. Tests that the wrong-domain metric is computed.
traps: Source text is a licensor approval rule, but model tags it with 'logistics' which maps to logistics_shipping — wrong top-domain.

messages.text: Disney requires all Mickey 100th packaging artwork to be submitted through their BrandLoop portal at least 21 days before factory print start.

claims.summary: Disney Mickey 100th packaging artwork must be submitted via BrandLoop 21 days before factory print start
claims.exactQuote: Disney requires all Mickey 100th packaging artwork to be submitted through their BrandLoop portal at least 21 days before factory print start.
